title: Sign in and reach the dashboard
description: This test verifies that a resident can sign in with valid credentials and land on the household dashboard after authentication.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify household summary content is displayed

title: Complete a household task
description: This test verifies that a signed-in resident can complete a task from the task list and see it marked as completed.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the task is shown as completed
Verify the task list remains visible

title: Protect dashboard access before sign-in
description: This test verifies that an unauthenticated user cannot directly access the dashboard and can then sign in to continue.

steps.description: Verify access is blocked or redirected to sign in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Review bills and mark one as paid
description: This test verifies that an admin can open the bills page, mark a bill as paid, and see the paid status update.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the bill is shown as paid
Verify the bill list remains visible

title: Mark a bill as paid

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify a paid bill status is displayed
Verify the updated bill remains visible in the list

title: Block direct access to protected pages before sign-in
description: This test verifies that an unauthenticated user cannot open a protected page directly and is prompted to sign in before continuing.

steps.description: Verify access is blocked or the user is redirected to sign in

title: Create and assign a new task

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Select a household member to assign the task to
Verify the new task appears in the task list
Verify the assigned task is visible

title: Show validation when credentials are incorrect
description: This test verifies that invalid login credentials produce a validation message and keep the user signed out.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Verify a login validation error is visible
Verify the user remains on the login page

title: Show validation when password is missing
description: This test verifies that submitting the login form without a password shows a login validation message and does not complete sign-in.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Verify a login validation error is visible
Verify the user remains on the login page
